name: Voice Waveform
description: Live audio visualization showing speech amplitude as an animated waveform — supports bar, sine wave, circular, and minimal display modes for real-time voice feedback.

bar.description: Vertical bars (32 bars, width 3px, gap 2px) that oscillate with speech amplitude — center bars taller for mid-range voice frequencies, edges shorter

wave.description: Smooth sine wave rendered via SVG path that undulates with speech cadence — amplitude controls wave height, frequency controls wave density

circular.description: Waveform wrapped around a 128px diameter circle with amplitude extending radially outward — creates a pulsing orb effect during active speech

minimal.description: Single horizontal line that thickens and thins with volume — extremely compact, suitable for inline placement next to speaker names or mic icons

visual_brief: A horizontal strip showing real-time audio amplitude. In bar mode: 32 vertical bars, each 3px wide with 2px gap, aligned at their vertical center. Heights map to frequency bands — the center 10–12 bars are taller (representing mid-range voice frequencies at 300–3000 Hz), while edge bars are shorter (low and high frequency). During active speech, bars animate at 60fps with heights oscillating between 4px (quiet) and 100% container height (loud). Active bars use the accent color with a subtle glow (box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--d-accent)). During silence, bars collapse to 2–4px heights in a muted/neutral color at 20% opacity, barely visible. The wave preset renders a single SVG path element using a cubic bezier approximation of a sine wave. The path's vertical displacement corresponds to amplitude (±24px from center at max volume), and the wave's horizontal frequency increases slightly with louder speech. Stroke width is 2px, accent color, with a subtle drop-shadow. The circular preset draws 64 radial lines emanating from a center point, each line's length proportional to its frequency band's amplitude. Lines extend outward from a 64px radius circle. Active speech creates a dynamic starburst/sea-urchin effect. A faint circle outline (1px, muted) marks the base radius. The minimal preset is a single horizontal line (2px default stroke) that smoothly animates stroke-width between 1px (silence) and 6px (loud speech), using accent color when active and muted color when silent.

layout_hints.note: The waveform should be placed near voice/audio controls. It works well inside a toolbar, header bar, or alongside a speaker avatar. For the circular preset, ensure the parent container allows the 128px square footprint.
layout_hints.data_binding: Bind to a Web Audio API AnalyserNode. The component expects a Float32Array of frequency data (32 or 64 bins depending on preset) updated at 60fps via requestAnimationFrame.
layout_hints.color_states: Active speech: var(--d-accent). Silence: var(--d-muted) at 20% opacity. Muted: var(--d-muted) at 10% opacity with a strikethrough icon overlay.

slots.waveform-canvas: The primary SVG or Canvas element that renders the waveform visualization. In bar mode, this is a flex container holding 32 AmplitudeBar elements centered vertically. Each bar is a rounded rectangle (border-radius: 1.5px) with its height driven by the corresponding frequency bin value. The canvas handles the animation loop — on each frame, it reads frequency data from the audio analyser and updates bar heights with a slight easing (lerp factor 0.3) to smooth out jitter. Background is transparent. The canvas must be GPU-accelerated (will-change: transform) to maintain 60fps.
slots.amplitude-bar: Repeating slot — one per frequency bin (32 in bar preset, 64 in circular). Each bar is a thin vertical rectangle, width 3px, with dynamic height. Bars use CSS custom properties (--bar-height) updated via JavaScript for animation. Color transitions between muted (silence) and accent (speech) over 150ms. Bars have border-radius: 1.5px for softened edges. In the circular preset, bars become radial lines rotated around the center point at equal angular intervals (360°/64 = 5.625° apart).
slots.frequency-display: Optional diagnostic slot showing the dominant frequency in Hz as small monospace text (text-xs, text-muted). Positioned below the waveform canvas. Useful for debugging or advanced UIs. Hidden by default in all presets — toggled via a data attribute.
slots.voice-indicator: A small (8px) colored dot positioned to the left of the waveform canvas. Green when speech is detected (VAD active), muted/gray when silent, red when in error state (no microphone access). Includes a subtle pulse animation (scale 1→1.3→1 over 1.5s) when speech is active. Serves as a quick glanceable status indicator independent of the waveform animation.
slots.mute-toggle: An icon button (24×24px) positioned to the right of the waveform canvas. Shows a microphone icon when unmuted, a microphone-off icon with a diagonal strikethrough when muted. Clicking toggles the audio input. When muted, the entire waveform dims to 20% opacity and bars freeze at minimum height. The button has hover (background: var(--d-muted)/10%) and focus-visible (outline ring) states.

keyboard: Space: toggle mute (when mute button focused)

responsive.mobile: Bar count reduces from 32 to 16 for performance. Circular preset scales down to 96px diameter. Minimal preset remains unchanged. MuteToggle increases to 44×44px for touch targets.
responsive.tablet: Full bar count maintained. Circular preset at full 128px. Touch-friendly mute toggle at 36×36px.

micro.bar-oscillation: height transition per frame, lerp factor 0.3, GPU-accelerated via transform: scaleY()

transitions.mute-state: opacity 0.2→1 or 1→0.2 over 200ms ease-in-out for entire waveform
transitions.preset-switch: crossfade 300ms — old preset fades out, new preset fades in

ambient.voice-indicator-pulse: scale(1) → scale(1.3) → scale(1) 1.5s ease-in-out infinite when speech active
ambient.silence-idle: bars drift to random 2–4px heights with slow (2s) easing to avoid perfectly static appearance

composition.VoiceWaveform: Section(d-section, inline-flex, items-center, gap-2) > [VoiceIndicator + WaveformCanvas(svg|canvas, animated) + MuteToggle?]
